description: A layered Italian dessert made with coffee-soaked ladyfingers and a mascarpone-based cream, usually dusted with cocoa. It is known for its soft texture and strong coffee flavor.
preparation_steps: Dip the ladyfingers briefly in coffee.
Layer the soaked biscuits and cream.
Chill until set, then dust with cocoa before serving.

health_advice.benefits: Provides an enjoyable dessert portion with coffee flavor rather than excessive sweetness alone.
health_advice.risks: Often high in sugar and fat, and versions containing raw egg need careful handling.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Serve smaller portions and keep it as an occasional dessert.

dietary_notes.note: Classic tiramisu is vegetarian but not vegan. Gluten-free and vegan versions are possible with substitute biscuits and cream components.
